props.ChoiceText: Order had to be restored where rank was thin and resentment thick, which taught you how punishment echoes in a house long after it is given.
props.ChoiceBio: Discipline below stairs taught you that obedience is cheapest when it looks voluntary.

0.TransitionText: Because discipline below stairs taught you that obedience is cheapest when it looks voluntary, household authority remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Steward, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TargetText: Someone corrected under your authority still weighs whether to fear or serve you.
